name: Vermont Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Vermont cheddar cheese, coarsely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except vegetables and crackers in a blender or food processor.
2. Process for 1 to 2 minutes, stopping to scrape sides until the mixture is smooth.
Dip will keep about one week or more in the refrigerator. Allow it to stand at least 30 minutes at room temperature before serving with raw vegetables and crackers for dipping.
